zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain ap Llywelyn于大约1470年出生在威尔士丹比爾-布利特 易薩福时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap David30岁，母亲Mrs Llewelyn ap David27岁。他和Elen ferch Robert至少有8个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain ap Llywelyn was born about 1470, in Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Llewelyn ap David, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Llewelyn ap David, was 27. He had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Elen ferch Robert.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain ap Llywelyn est né environ 1470, à Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Llewelyn ap David, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs Llewelyn ap David, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Elen ferch Robert.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain ap Llywelyn um 1470 in Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap David 30 und seine Mutter Mrs Llewelyn ap David 27. Er hatte mit Elen ferch Robert mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Llywelyn è nato il circa 1470 nel Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap David, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Llewelyn ap David, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Elen ferch Robert.

ja.Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.Plâs Uchaf, Llanfaethlu, Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイランファエスル

ja.Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Wales: ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアトイ-ブリス イサフ
ja.lifeSummary: Owain ap Llywelynが約1470年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアトイ-ブリス イサフで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Davidは30歳，母Mrs Llewelyn ap Davidは27歳であった。彼はElen ferch Robertとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain ap Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1470년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 타이-브리스 이사프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap David(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Llewelyn ap David(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Elen ferch Robert(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Llywelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Llewelyn ap David, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Llewelyn ap David, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Elen ferch Robert.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain ap Llywelyn родился около 1470 г. в местности ти-брит исаф, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap David было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Llewelyn ap David, 27. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Elen ferch Robert.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain ap Llywelyn nació aproximadamente 1470, en Ty-Brith Isaf, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Llewelyn ap David, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs Llewelyn ap David, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Elen ferch Robert.
